name: Choosing Doctors for Sandy Work Injuries

mainEntity.name: Can I choose my own doctor for a work injury in Sandy Utah?
mainEntity.text: Can I choose my own doctor for a work injury in Sandy Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, most Utah employers use managed care networks; you must use approved providers like Intermountain InstaCare or IHC Work Med or face claim denial and personal payment responsibility.

suggestedAnswer.text: Utah's workers comp system mandates network care for full coverage. Exceptions rare and require approval. Insurers deny off-network claims routinely—check your employer's list (e.g., Jordan District providers) and get legal help to challenge denials or seek variance.
